svg.text: Detailed input -> method -> output -> fusion flow
Counts are v2 artifacts. Event rows are long-format target rows unless shown as samples.
event labels: EV / LA / hard-hit / barrel / xBA / xwOBA
EV / LA / hard-hit / barrel / xBA / xwOBA
different BBE events are never averaged
BA / OBP / SLG / OPS and rates
HTML / CSV tables / SVG and PNG figures / overlay videos
CV artifacts are created from contact clips
season stats are labels for fitting/evaluation
Key reading: video methods are strong on the small same-sample event subset; context/fusion have much larger coverage.
